name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in SandCastle
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `sandcastle run --profile ... -- ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error messages or log output.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15, Windows 11)
- **SandCastle version**: (`sandcastle --version`)
- **Rust version**: (`rustc --version`)
- **Kernel version** (Linux): (`uname -r`)
